name: Veal Roast Florentine... Magazine
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup White wine; dry, or water
recipeInstructions:
DIRECTIONS -- SEASON THE OUTSIDE OF THE MEAT WITH PEPPER, 1/2 TEASPOON Poultry seasoning, Basil, and Garlic powder. TURN THE MEAT OVER. COMBINE SPINACH, SALT, CHEESE, AND RED PEPPER WITH THE REMAINING 1 1/2 TEASPOON Poultry seasoning and Basil, and 1 teaspoon Garlic powder. SPREAD EVENLY OVER THE MEAT. TIGHTLY ROLL UP THE MEAT; TIE WITH STRING AT 1-INCH INTERVALS. HEAT OIL IN A Dutch oven or heavy roasting pan. BROWN THE ROAST ON ALL SIDES. POUR BROTH ON TOP. COVER TIGHTLY AND ROAST AT 350°F FOR 1 1/2 HOURS OR UNTIL 165°F INTERNAL TEMP. REMOVE THE ROAST TO A CARVING BOARD; KEEP WARM. STRAIN LIQUID AND SKIM FAT. COMBINE WINE AND CORNSTARCH, STIR INTO LIQUID. BRING TO BOIL, SIMMER 5 MINUTES, STIRRING UNTIL THICKENED.
Note: The recipe provides nutritional information with 524 calories, 58 grams protein, 7 grams carbohydrates, 27 grams fat, 628 milligrams sodium, and 245 milligrams cholesterol.
